title: Chesniella macrantha
taxonomy: Chesniella macrantha is classified as a species of green algae in the family Palmelloideae. More specifically, it belongs to the phylum Chlorophyta and the class Chlorophyceae. This classification is based on its cellular and molecular characteristics. Chesniella macrantha is considered to be a type of freshwater alga. Its classification within the Palmelloideae family suggests a close relationship with other Palmelloideae species.
